description: SSOT mapping bead status/labels -> projects/ Kanban lane (the symlink folder a project is mounted into). Read by scripts/project_status_symlinks.py and documented for humans in workflow.yaml. Lane FOLDERS are numbered ('N. name') so a file explorer sorts them in lifecycle order; lane IDS stay short for the CLI (move/sync use the id, not the number). Add a lane = one entry here; the script and workflow.yaml derive from it, never from an if-branch. Resolution: status_overrides win first, then label_overrides (blocked/dod_blocked pull to the DoD gate regardless of progress), else the furthest-right lane whose status/label matches.

lanes.title: Backlog — raw, not yet specced
lanes.meaning: New work parked as an idea/ticket. Owner/PM keeps the list; no detail work yet. A new project lands here on `bd create` (status open).

lanes.title: DoD & Blocked — specced before launch / parked when blocked
lanes.meaning: The GATE: ticket is detailed in the bead (DoD / output / outcome / spec / requirements) BEFORE it is pulled into work, and a blocked ticket parks here until its named blocker clears. Std 4.15 dod_blocked — not taken into work until DoD/output/outcome are clarified.

lanes.title: In Progress — design, build, review
lanes.meaning: Active work: spec approved, implementation underway, parallel review squad running.

lanes.title: To Delivery — handed off, awaiting activation
lanes.meaning: Review passed; artifact is being delivered to owner / team / client and we wait for them to receive/activate it.

lanes.title: Verify & Done — outcome confirmed, closed
lanes.meaning: Owner activated the artifact; we verify the JTBD outcome materialized, then the bead is closed and reachable from origin/main.
